candidate.completion: text me back so my screen time can finally feel mutual.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please text me back so my screen time can finally feel mutual.

evaluation.rationale: A clear digital-era turn: "mutual" neatly reframes screen time as a lopsided relationship. The pivot is fresh and intelligible, but the line spends a few extra words getting there and lands more wry than piercing.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop calling my two-person table 'optimistic seating.'
